# Desensitization Policy

This Kit must not contain:

- Closed-source project names
- Customer names
- Private product names
- Private repository URLs
- Internal absolute paths
- API keys, tokens, credentials
- Screenshots or text copied from private systems

Use generic placeholders:

- `Example Product`
- `Target Repository`
- `Agent Runtime`
- `Embedded Target`
- `Evaluation System`
- `Project Module`
